customerEmail: Hi, what are your support hours and how quickly should I expect a reply?
contextNotes: Support hours are Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM-5:00 PM Eastern Time. First responses are usually sent within one business day.

customerEmail: This is ridiculous. I paid for Pro and your app still won't export my report. I need this fixed today or I am cancelling.
contextNotes: Pro customers can export CSV and PDF reports. Known incident INC-1842 is causing intermittent PDF export failures today. CSV export is still working. Support can escalate affected Pro accounts to engineering, but cannot promise same-day resolution.

customerEmail: Can you change it back to how it was before? The new thing is not working for my team.
contextNotes: Agents can revert a workspace to the classic inbox layout if the customer provides the workspace name. The new analytics dashboard cannot be reverted.

customerEmail: Do you integrate with AcmeCRM, and is the integration included in the Starter plan?
contextNotes: Starter plan includes up to 3 shared inboxes and basic email support. Pro plan includes automation rules and priority support.

customerEmail: We renewed 33 days ago but forgot to cancel. Can you refund the annual renewal? We have not used the product since renewal.
contextNotes: Annual renewals are refundable within 30 days of the renewal date. After 30 days, support cannot issue a refund, but can turn off auto-renewal for the next term.

customerEmail: I am onboarding five teammates next week. Can we import old tickets, set up SSO, and get someone to train our admins?
contextNotes: Bulk ticket import is available for Pro and Enterprise plans through a CSV template. SSO is available only on Enterprise. Admin training is available as a paid add-on and can be scheduled after purchase.
